name: Align Technology Inc.
summary: Align Technology Inc. is a global medical device company that designs, manufactures, and markets Invisalign clear aligners, iTero intraoral scanners, and exocad CAD/CAM software for orthodontic and restorative dentistry. Their products help dentists and orthodontists achieve clinical results and deliver effective, cutting-edge dental solutions. Align Technology is headquartered in Tempe, Arizona.
